system_description: B2B SaaS for commercial banks and credit unions; processes wire transfers, ACH origination, and fraud monitoring. SOC 2 Type II in place; PCI DSS v4.0 in scope for the wire transfer module.

information_types.name: Wire transfer and ACH records
information_types.description: Wire details, ACH files, fraud signals
information_types.rationale: All three: wire windows are time-sensitive, integrity is critical, and financial PII is sensitive.

information_types.name: Account holder PII
information_types.rationale: Confidentiality: serious if disclosed (financial PII). Integrity/availability: limited.
